notes: Reviewed exact Wikimedia Commons source manifest for Media Phase 3S Germany/Benelux core legacy folders. Do not download images in this task; Wikimedia File sourceUrl values are intentionally provided without downloadUrl so the importer can auto-resolve originals. No generic images are included. Outlets with fewer than two exact safe sources are recorded in reviewSummary only and deferred for future documented generic production-safe fill.

excludedSources.reason: Verified licensed exact Fashion Outlet Center Montabaur/The Style Outlets Montabaur source, but not added because this batch only adds entries for outlets with at least two exact safe sources.
Verified licensed exact Designer Outlet Neumünster source, but excluded from the four selected slots because it is sculpture-focused and less useful than entrance/storefront coverage.
Excluded because it depicts the wider Wittorf/Neumünster area rather than clearly documenting Designer Outlet Neumünster.
Excluded for designer-outlet-berlin because it documents Zalando Outlet in Berlin, not Designer Outlet Berlin in Wustermark.
Excluded for designer-outlet-roosendaal because available Commons material found documents the city/municipality, not the Designer Outlet Roosendaal site.
Excluded because it depicts a Maasmechelen incident scene, not Maasmechelen Village outlet coverage.

reviewSummary.manifestDecision: Create manifest entries only for outlets with two or more exact production-safe sources: designer-outlet-neumunster, wertheim-village, zweibrucken-fashion-outlet, and designer-outlets-wolfsburg. Defer designer-outlet-berlin, montabaur-the-style-outlets, designer-outlet-roosendaal, and maasmechelen-village to future generic production-safe fill or additional exact-source discovery. No generic images are included.
